segments.text: This is a synthetic public demo recording for testing transcript editing.
I want to understand what changed after the workshop.
Participant 1, the biggest change is confidence.
I would hesitate and ask someone else to handle difficult moments.
and keep the person involved instead of rushing through it.
was there anything that still felt hard in practice?
Participant 2, time pressure is still hard.
but busy days make it easy to fall back into old habits.
The markers help me come back to the exact point where I need to review something.
I am going to mark that as something to follow up on in the next session.
Participant 1, the document view helps because I can read it like a conversation.
The row view helps when I need to check the timing against the audio.
export Range control is important too.
Sometimes I only need the section from 1 marker to the end, and sometimes I need a clean document without timestamps.
